AR1.justification: Routed to observations.md with mild hedging ('this is a single observed pattern rather than a measured trend, and the framing ("always") is the user's'), but largely absorbs the claim into agent voice and offers no explicit invocation of the observation-vs-decision routing distinction.

AR3.justification: No cross-references in the artifact; no daybook Log breadcrumb to the observation.

AR4.justification: Section header has no ISO-dated prefix; a re-run would overwrite the section rather than append a new dated entry.
